name: Vonage
description: Cloud communications APIs and SDKs for voice, SMS, messaging, video, and verification.

auth_methods.note: Official docs describe API key & secret usage, Application JWTs for apps, and other signing/auth concepts (signatures).

credential_access.note: Vonage’s official account guide states you can obtain/find your API key and secret in the Vonage API Dashboard, indicating self-serve access after creating an account.

api_surface.note: Vonage exposes RESTful APIs across its product surfaces (SMS, Voice, Messages, Verify, etc.) and provides official SDKs that wrap those REST APIs; documentation root lists product APIs and SDKs.

buildability.note: Public docs and self-serve account signup + API key issuance allow developers to start building immediately. Some specific channels/features (e.g., WhatsApp Business) require additional verification/onboarding documented separately and may block that channel until approved.

queries: Vonage API key secret Developer Dashboard
Vonage developer sign up get api key
